---
name: Greenhouse feature request
about: Request a new greenhouse capability, integration, or documentation improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: [enhancement]
assignees: []
---

## Goal

What do you want the project to do?

## Why it matters

What real greenhouse problem does this solve?

## Constraints

- Must stay in the 5 V phase, or okay to target the future 12 V phase:
- Hardware you already have:
- Things that must stay unchanged:

## Proposed behavior

Describe the user-facing behavior, wiring impact, and safety expectations.

## Documentation impact

Which docs should change if this feature is added?
